rules.name: Orphan Table
rules.message: Table '{tableName}' has no relationships with other tables
rules.recommendation: Verify if this table is still needed or should be connected to other tables

rules.name: Inconsistent Naming Convention
rules.recommendation: Consider renaming to follow consistent naming convention: {suggestedName}

rules.name: Text Column Without Length
rules.message: Column '{columnName}' in table '{tableName}' is VARCHAR(MAX) without length constraint
rules.recommendation: Specify a reasonable max length to prevent excessive storage usage
